subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Remey et al, spoken on 1914-10-18
subcodes.first_line: The children must receive divine and material education at the same time, and be protected from temptations and vices.... In the scheme of human life
subcodes.first_line_orig: از این مکاتب ثمری نیست اطفال در مکاتب الهی هم تحصیل علوم میکنند و هم آداب یاد میگیرند
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @education of children; moral education, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
